text.title: Audience to Customer Funnel Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the project have a paid conversion goal (not pure awareness)?

branch.question: Is there ≥30 days of channel data?

text.example: Solo SaaS with 60 days data, paid trial in place → publish funnel + thresholds.
